<div align="center">

# 🎵 RADHA MUSIC 🎵

<img src="https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?font=Poppins&size=35&duration=3000&pause=1000&color=FF69B4&center=true&vCenter=true&width=800&lines=🎶+RADHA+MUSIC+BOT;⚡+Fast+%7C+Powerful+%7C+Reliable;🚀+24%2F7+Telegram+Music+Streaming;💖+Made+With+Love" />

<img src="https://capsule-render.vercel.app/api?type=waving&color=FF69B4,FF1493,FFB6C1&height=250&section=header&text=RADHA%20MUSIC&fontSize=60&fontColor=ffffff&animation=fadeIn"/>

</div>

---

## 🌟 Features

✨ High Quality Audio Streaming

🎵 YouTube Music Playback

📻 Live Radio Streaming

🎙 Voice Chat Music

📃 Playlist Support

🔍 Fast Song Search

⚡ Lag-Free Performance

🛡 24/7 Stability

🎚 Queue Management

👥 Multi Group Support

---

### Replit

[![Deploy on Railway](https://railway.app/button.svg)](https://railway.app)

## 🎶 Supported Platforms

| Platform | Supported |
|-----------|-----------|
| YouTube | ✅ |
| Telegram Audio | ✅ |
| Live Stream | ✅ |
| Radio | ✅ |
| Voice Chat | ✅ |

---

## ⚙️ Commands

```text
/play song name
/vplay video name
/pause
/resume
/skip
/end
/queue
/song
/lyrics
/ping
/stats
```
